name: Synthesize Two-Band RGB Composite
description: An observatory's public relations team needs to publish a color image of the globular cluster Messier 12 using B and V band observations located in ~/AstroImages/outreach/ (Bcomb.fits and Vcomb.fits). Synthesize a green channel by calculating the pixel-by-pixel average of the two bands: (B + V) / 2, maintaining 32-bit floating point precision. Save this synthetic image as ~/AstroImages/outreach/synthetic_green.fits. Create an RGB composite using Vcomb.fits for the Red channel, synthetic_green.fits for the Green channel, and Bcomb.fits for the Blue channel. Adjust visual contrast so the cluster stars are clearly visible and save the final merged color image as ~/AstroImages/outreach/m12_color_composite.tif.
